stephensTake.title: Q1 2026 Whale Watch
stephensTake.body: The Cliff corridor and Dionis waterfront continue to command the island's highest per-transaction prices. What's notable this quarter is the velocity—these aren't languishing on market. Serious buyers are moving decisively on trophy properties, often before public marketing begins. If you're considering the $10M+ segment, the window for off-market conversations is now.
